summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KULJADEED e-commerce store for YR currency change and Categories CRUD. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with products showing YR currency (e.g., 299.99 YR, 1000.00 YR)
Product detail page shows price in YR format (1000.00 YR)
Cart sheet shows prices in YR format (item prices, subtotal, total)
Admin dashboard revenue shows in YR format (0.00 YR)
Admin products list shows prices in YR format
Admin page has Categories tab with CRUD operations
Categories tab shows existing 4 categories (Electronics, Fashion, Beauty, Home)
Create new category via admin Categories tab - successfully created TEST_Sports
Delete category via admin Categories tab - successfully deleted TEST_Sports
Arabic language switch works - prices show 'ريال' suffix (299.99 ريال)
RTL layout works correctly when switched to Arabic
Categories show Arabic names when in Arabic mode
Backend API: GET /api/categories returns categories list
Backend API: POST /api/admin/categories creates new category
Backend API: Admin authentication works correctly
Backend API: Products API returns prices correctly
Backend API: Admin stats returns revenue data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Currency has been successfully changed from $ to YR (Yemeni Rial). formatPrice() function in LanguageContext.js returns 'X.XX YR' in English and 'X.XX ريال' in Arabic. Categories CRUD is fully functional in admin panel under Categories tab. Backend Stripe checkout uses 'usd' internally but frontend displays YR. All 4 seeded categories exist: Electronics, Fashion, Beauty, Home.

categories_crud.view: Categories tab shows all categories with EN/AR names
categories_crud.create: Add Category dialog with name_en, name_ar, icon fields
